name: python3-pyexcel-xls
title: python3-pyexcel-xls
summary: Wrapper library to manipulate data in xls using xlrd and xlwt (Python 3)
description:
Wrapper library to manipulate data in xls using xlrd and xlwt (Python 3)
This package contains a tiny wrapper library to read, manipulate and write
data in xls format and it can read xlsx and xlsm fromat. You are likely to use
it with pyexcel.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
